options.query: index=main sourcetype=tetragon:json earliest=-24h | spath | eval workload=coalesce('process_exec.process.pod.workload', 'process_kprobe.process.pod.workload', 'process_exit.process.pod.workload', "unknown") | stats count by workload

index=main sourcetype=tetragon:json earliest=-24h | spath | eval workload=coalesce('process_exec.process.pod.workload', 'process_kprobe.process.pod.workload', 'process_exit.process.pod.workload', "unknown") | timechart span=5m count by workload

index=main sourcetype=tetragon:json earliest=-24h | spath | search process_kprobe.function_name=tcp_connect | eval pod='process_kprobe.process.pod.name' | eval dst_ip='process_kprobe.args{}.sock_arg.daddr' | eval dst_port='process_kprobe.args{}.sock_arg.dport' | eval binary='process_kprobe.process.binary' | stats count by pod, binary, dst_ip, dst_port | sort -count

index=main sourcetype=tetragon:json earliest=-24h | spath | search process_exec.process.binary=* | eval binary='process_exec.process.binary' | eval namespace='process_exec.process.pod.namespace' | stats count by binary, namespace | sort -count
index=main sourcetype=tetragon:json earliest=-24h | spath | stats count by node_name

index=main sourcetype=tetragon:json earliest=-24h | spath | eval event_type=case(isnotnull(process_exec), "process_exec", isnotnull(process_exit), "process_exit", isnotnull(process_kprobe), "process_kprobe", 1=1, "other") | stats count by event_type

index=main sourcetype=tetragon:json earliest=-1h | spath | eval event_type=case(isnotnull(process_exec), "exec", isnotnull(process_exit), "exit", isnotnull(process_kprobe), "kprobe", 1=1, "other") | eval workload=coalesce('process_exec.process.pod.workload', 'process_kprobe.process.pod.workload', 'process_exit.process.pod.workload', "unknown") | eval binary=coalesce('process_exec.process.binary', 'process_kprobe.process.binary', 'process_exit.process.binary', "unknown") | eval pod=coalesce('process_exec.process.pod.name', 'process_kprobe.process.pod.name', 'process_exit.process.pod.name', "unknown") | table _time, event_type, workload, pod, binary, node_name | sort -_time | head 50

title: Money Honey Security
description: Tetragon runtime security events from the money-honey namespace. Process executions, network connections, and kprobe audit trail.
